news.title: Caterpillar (CAT) Lands Key Role In Chevron Microsoft AI Data Center Build
news.summary: Caterpillar (NYSE:CAT) is supplying engines and turbines to power a massive Microsoft AI data center in West Texas. The project is tied to a 20-year natural gas supply agreement between Chevron and Microsoft. Caterpillar's Power Generation segment is seeing strong demand, with record order backlogs linked to AI-related infrastructure projects.
